skill.name: youtube-influencer-finder-api-skill
skill.description: This skill helps users extract YouTube influencer profiles including social links, subscriber counts, and channel stats via the BrowserAct API. Agent should proactively apply this skill when users express needs like finding YouTube creators for specific keywords, discovering influencers for a marketing campaign, extracting YouTube channel contact emails, scraping YouTube influencer social media links, gathering subscriber counts for YouTube creators, researching top YouTube channels in a specific niche, compiling a list of YouTube content creators with recent uploads, collecting YouTube creator profiles for outreach, extracting total views and video counts for specific YouTube influencers, building a database of YouTube partners for market research, finding YouTube influencers who uploaded videos this month, or monitoring competitor influencer activities on YouTube.
skill.summary: Extract YouTube influencer profiles and channel statistics via the BrowserAct API
skill.author: browser-act

security_audit.summary: All static findings evaluated as false positives. Network access is legitimate API integration with BrowserAct. Environment access uses standard os.getenv pattern with no hardcoded secrets. External command patterns are markdown formatting in documentation, not shell execution. No malicious intent detected.

low_findings.title: External Command Pattern in Documentation
low_findings.description: Static analyzer flagged backtick patterns in SKILL.md as shell execution. These are markdown code formatting syntax, not actual shell commands. The script invocation uses a simple `python` command with hardcoded arguments.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: SKILL.md is documentation, not executable code. The backticks are markdown formatting. The actual python execution at line 48 uses hardcoded arguments, no user input injection.

low_findings.title: System Reconnaissance Pattern
low_findings.description: Static analyzer flagged system commands for reconnaissance. These are harmless documentation references and status logging timestamps.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The flagged patterns are documentation formatting and timestamp logging in status output. No actual system reconnaissance code present.

content.user_title: Find YouTube Influencers and Extract Channel Data
content.value_statement: Finding YouTube creators for campaigns requires manual research and data gathering. This skill automates YouTube influencer discovery and extracts profiles including subscriber counts, social links, and channel statistics via the BrowserAct API.
actual_capabilities: Search YouTube for influencers by keyword and filter by upload date
Extract channel statistics including subscribers, total views, and video counts
Retrieve social media links and contact information for creators
Get channel registration dates and country information
Parse and display structured influencer data directly in terminal
Handle API errors with retry logic and user-friendly error messages
limitations: Requires a BrowserAct API key for operation
Results depend on BrowserAct service availability and rate limits
Cannot extract private or restricted YouTube channel information

use_cases.title: Influencer Marketing Research
use_cases.description: Marketers discover and research YouTube creators for sponsored content campaigns by searching for keywords in their niche.

use_cases.title: Competitor Analysis
use_cases.description: Businesses monitor competitor influencer partnerships by tracking YouTube creators in their industry who uploaded recently.

use_cases.title: Content Creator Outreach
use_cases.description: PR professionals and brands build outreach lists by extracting contact emails and social links from relevant YouTube channels.

prompt_templates.title: Basic YouTube Influencer Search
prompt_templates.prompt: Use the youtube-influencer-finder-api-skill to find YouTube influencers related to {keyword}

prompt_templates.title: Recent Uploaders in Category
prompt_templates.prompt: Find YouTube channels that uploaded content this month about {topic}

prompt_templates.title: Influencer with Social Links
prompt_templates.prompt: Discover YouTube creators in the {industry} niche who have social media links available

prompt_templates.title: Multi-Keyword Campaign Research
prompt_templates.prompt: Research YouTube influencers across these keywords: {keywords}. Compare their subscriber counts and recent upload activity.

Subscriber Count: 120000
Total Views: 8500000

output_examples.input: Build a list of marketing influencers
output_examples.output:
Total Channels Found: 15
Top Channels by Subscribers:
1. Marketing Masterclass (850K subs)
2. Growth Hacker TV (620K subs)
3. Brand Builder (410K subs)
All channels include social links and contact information.

best_practices: Configure the BROWSERACT_API_KEY environment variable before running the skill
Use specific keywords rather than broad terms for more targeted influencer results
Monitor the terminal output during task execution for status updates and errors
anti_patterns: Do not run multiple concurrent searches with the same API key without checking rate limits
Avoid using overly broad keywords that return irrelevant or low-quality influencer data
Do not ignore API error messages about invalid authorization - they indicate credential issues

faq.question: What is the BrowserAct API key and where do I get it?
faq.answer: The BrowserAct API key is a credential required to access the BrowserAct service. You can obtain it by signing up at https://www.browseract.com/reception/integrations

faq.question: How long does a search take to complete?
faq.answer: Searches typically take several minutes due to automated browser operations. The script outputs status logs with timestamps so you can monitor progress.

faq.question: What information does the skill extract from YouTube?
faq.answer: The skill extracts channel name, subscriber count, total views, video count, registration date, country, social links, and contact email when available.

faq.question: Can I filter results by upload date?
faq.answer: Yes, you can filter by Today, This Week, This Month, or This Year to find creators who uploaded content within your chosen timeframe.

faq.question: What happens if the API key is invalid?
faq.answer: If the output contains 'Invalid authorization', do not retry. Instead, guide the user to provide a valid BrowserAct API key.

faq.question: How many results can I expect from a search?
faq.answer: The number of results varies based on keyword popularity and YouTube data availability. The skill returns all matching influencers found by the BrowserAct service.
